description: A design document (prospekt dev-cycle `design` kind) describing a larger task to decompose, plus optional runtime caps. Tolerant: only the design core is required; prospekt-injected or extra fields ride along and are ignored.

title.description: Short human-readable name for the design.

summary.description: What this design covers and why it exists.

requirements.description: Numbered requirements the decomposition must cover.

max_units.description: Cap on the number of units the planner may emit (default 8 when absent). Overridable per run; never a bare constant.

max_fix_rounds.description: Cap on bounded dev-fix rounds per blocked unit (default 2 when absent).
